# Bootstrap Environment

Validate and improve this workspace customization setup.

## Tasks

1. Validate all frontmatter blocks.
2. Verify file placement under `.github`.
3. Check discoverability language in each description.
4. Report missing components and propose minimal fixes.
5. Summarize improvements with actionable next steps.
